bgm.name: 06 ゆっくり時間が流れる町

parameters: Hmm, clothing stores are surprisingly slow, huh?
Or maybe there just aren't many customers today?
You two, do you have a moment?
If you're free, I'd like you to help me organize
some merchandise. Now looks like a good time.
Well, since this will be heavy lifting stuff, \n[1]
is enough. I'll be borrowing him for a bit.
Just call us if you need help with anything.
Feel free to take your time
Feel free to take your time
Umm, we're actually here looking for work.
Is there anything you might need help with?
It's not that I don't want to hire you,
but are you here because of the Fruit?
Well that's just perfect. We're in need
of people in clothing production and
customer service. Are you willing to help?
I can handle customer service, but I'm
but I'm not sure how much help
Not to worry. I just need you to help the tailor
with tasks like cutting and trying on clothes.
Oh, or if the both of you want to
I can go help with clothing production.
of the tailor in the back.

Now then, you're name is... Lalana?
of the tailor in the back.
The tailor is a little quirky,

Will that be alright, Ms. Manager?
That's okay. Well then, I'll be in the back.
If you have any questions, feel free to call me.
Our apologies, it doesn't look like
we'll be of help, so we'll decline...
I wasn't going to ask you to do anything
difficult, but if that's how you feel...
Drop by again if you change your mind.
ララナと一緒に仕事探し中のヘルプ吹き出し

Haaah, haaaah, yeah, it's a very big person...

can you come here for a sec?

I'll be done soon, so I'll be fine...

but in the changing room? My apologies,
